name: commitr
description: AI-generated commit messages from your staged diff. Local. Private. Zero-config.

commitr.ollamaUrl.description: Ollama server base URL. Change this if you run Ollama on a custom port or remote host.

commitr.model.markdownDescription: Ollama model to use. Must be pulled first — run `ollama pull qwen2.5:3b`. Any instruction-tuned model works.

enumDescriptions: Enforces type(scope): subject format (Conventional Commits spec).
Lets the model write freely — no format enforced.
commitr.commitStyle.description: Output format for generated commit messages.

commitr.generateBody.description: When enabled, generates a commit body for diffs spanning 3 or more files.

commitr.scopeMappings.markdownDescription:
Custom path prefix to scope overrides.

Example:
```json
{
  "src/auth": "auth",
  "src/payments": "payments"
}
```

walkthroughs.title: Get started with Commitr
walkthroughs.description: Set up local AI commit messages in two minutes.

steps.title: Install Ollama
steps.description:
Commitr uses Ollama to run AI locally on your machine. Nothing leaves your network.

[Download Ollama](https://ollama.com)

steps.title: Pull the model
steps.description:
Pull the default model and start Ollama. Run this in your terminal:

```
ollama pull qwen2.5:3b
ollama serve
```

[Open Terminal](command:workbench.action.terminal.new)

steps.title: Try it
steps.description:
Stage a file, then click the $(heart) button in the Source Control panel — or press Ctrl+Shift+Alt+C.

[Open Source Control](command:workbench.view.scm)

scripts.compile: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js
scripts.package: npm run check-types && npm run lint && node esbuild.js --production
scripts.pretest: npm run compile-tests && npm run compile && npm run lint
